Algoma Public Library seeking well-organized, creative energetic person fill position library director.
Algoma Public Library member Nicolet Federated Library System OWLSNet consortium, located shore Lake Michigan, serves municipal community 3,167 provides library services non-municipal residents Kewaunee County.
Library Director under direct supervision member Board Trustees responsible operations library including serving library's executive officer technical advisor board, building maintaining collection, managing library budget finances, supervising library staff, maintaining library building, developing, implementing promoting library services residents community.
Candidates must have Bachelor Degree have Grade Library Certification, file provisional certification application complete required coursework within certification guidelines.
Strong administrative, communication organizational skills; knowledge public library philosophy, principles procedures allow effective sound recommendations board; ability create maintain effective public relations, manage library finances, communicate effectively with library customers staff, effectively computer applications maintain skills through participation continuing education activities.
more years successful library experience comparable work experience required.
This salaried position hours week) includes benefits.

that king Ahasuerus give house Haman Jews'enemy Esther queen.
Mordecai came before king; Esther told what her.
king took ring, which taken from Haman, gave Mordecai.
Esther Mordecai over house Haman.
Esther spoke again before king, fell down feet, sought with tears away mischief Haman Agagite, device that devised against Jews.
endure evil that shall come people?
endure destruction kindred?
Then king Ahasuerus said Esther queen Mordecai Jew, Behold, have given Esther house Haman, they have hanged gallows, because laid hand Jews.
Write also Jews, likes you, king' name, seal with king' ring: writing which written king' name, sealed with king' ring, reverse.
Then were king' scribes called that time third month, that month Sivan, three twentieth thereof; written according that Mordecai commanded Jews, lieutenants, deputies rulers provinces which from India Ethiopia, hundred twenty seven provinces, every province according writing thereof, every people after their language, Jews according their writing, according their language.
provinces king Ahasuerus, namely, thirteenth twelfth month, which month Adar.
copy writing commandment given every province published people, that Jews should ready against that avenge themselves their enemies.
posts that rode mules camels went out, being hastened pressed king' commandment.
decree given Shushan palace.
Jews light, gladness, joy, honor.
every province, every city, wherever king' commandment decree came, Jews gladness, feast good day.
many people land became Jews; fear Jews fell them.

Michael Janisch electric double bassist, composer, bandleader, producer record label owner originally from currently based London, England.
composer bandleader Janisch released five albums date: TransAtlantic Collective's Traveling Song (co-led with Patrick Cornelius) 2008, Purpose Built (debut solo album) 2010, Banned London (co-led with Aruan Ortiz) 2013, First Meeting: Live London, Volume (co-led with Konitz, Tepfer Jeff Williams) 2014.
debut solo album Purpose Built established international reputation premier working contemporary improvised music, drew together sure-footed bass work (both electric acoustic), original compositions, arranging skills along with some characteristically strong performances from group comprised prominent musicians from both sides Atlantic, including Hart, Walter Smith III, Mike Moreno, Jason Palmer, Paul Booth, Aaron Goldberg, Phil Robson Johnathan Blake.
JazzTimes Magazine called "the complete package" while Jazz Journal noted "perfect blend tradition modernity" received with high critical acclaim fans, press, musicians fellow bassists, while making number 'Best Year' critics' lists.
Purpose Built also impetus creation Janisch's record label, Whirlwind Recordings which made immediate impact both sides Atlantic.
Described "the label moment, releasing diverse cross section excellent music."
(BBC Radio "one Europe's busiest most creative independent labels."
(The Irish Times), Whirlwind been featured label Jazz Journal, Downbeat, Jazz Thing Record Collector Magazines well York City Jazz Record.
addition performing Michael adjunct Professor Double Bass Trinity Laban Conservatoire Royal Academy Music London.
